dvids.title: 1st MARDIV transitions leadership from Maj. Gen. Thomas B. Savage to Brig. Gen. Andrew T. Priddy
dvids.desc: CAMP PENDLETON, Calif. — The Marine Corps’ most decorated division opened a new chapter as leadership of the famed "Blue Diamond" transitioned from Maj. Gen. Thomas B. Savage to Brig. Gen. Andrew T. Priddy during a change of command ceremony on May 29 at Marine Corps Base Camp Pendleton. Savage depa
